caribbean.headline: Caribbean Conditions: Aruba
caribbean.paragraph: Aruba in the Southern Caribbean is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 21 kt and seas building to 5.3 ft with NE swell at 7s periods. 49% rain probability -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz in the Western Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 21 kt and seas building to 5.9 ft with W swell at 14s periods. 100% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
